title: EEG based interpretation of human brain activity during yoga and meditation using machine learning: A systematic review
headline: EEG based interpretation of human brain activity during yoga and meditation using machine learning: A systemat
summary: A meta-analysis / systematic review of yoga examined brief & app-based practice. Our literature search and review indicate a broad spectrum of neural mechanics under a variety of meditation styles have been investigated.
keyFindings: Our literature search and review indicate a broad spectrum of neural mechanics under a variety of meditation styles have been investigated.
limitations: Pooled estimates combine heterogeneous studies; effect sizes vary by practice, population, and control condition.
The practice studied (yoga) is not the Miracle of Mind practice; findings do not transfer directly to MoM.
simplifiedTitle: EEG based interpretation of human brain activity during yoga and meditation using machine learning: A systemat
aiSnippet: Meta-analysis / Systematic review, Complementary therapies in clinical practice (2021). Our literature search and review indicate a broad spectrum of neural mechanics under a variety of meditation styles have been investigated.
